neighbors.name: Michael E. Klein & Peggy Klein
neighbors.claims: Public records do not confirm Michael E. and Peggy Klein as the current owners of parcel 106-06-021D, and no specific presence in Cochise County could be verified for these individuals. A 'Peggy Klein' appears in obituaries in other states, but no definitive link to this property exists in available records ([legacy.com](https://www.legacy.com/obituaries/search?countryUrl=united-states-of-america&dateRange=Last30Days&lastName=klein%20nee%20motz&page=10)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Verify current property ownership through county assessor records before outreach.

citations.claim: A 'Peggy Klein' appears in obituaries in other states, but no definitive link to this property exists in available records
citations.title: Legacy.com Obituary Search

neighbors.verification_notes: Original citations (coyotegulch.blog, citizenportal.ai) did not contain mentions of Michael or Peggy Klein. No Cochise County property records found for these names in public snippets.

neighbors.name: Zane Daniel Ritenour & Carina Marie Ritenour
neighbors.claims: Zane and Carina Ritenour are associated with the residential property at 2077 W Cougar Place (Parcel 106-06-018Q) in Huachuca City ([homes.com](https://www.homes.com/property/2077-w-cougar-place-huachuca-city-az/k8k492gnrzefc/)). Zane Ritenour is the owner and qualifying party for B-J Drilling Company, Inc., a long-standing water well drilling business in the region ([bjdrilling.com](https://bjdrilling.com/)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage Zane Ritenour with technical competence regarding groundwater impact, acknowledging his professional expertise in local water systems.

citations.claim: Zane and Carina Ritenour are associated with the residential property at 2077 W Cougar Place (Parcel 106-06-018Q) in Huachuca City
citations.title: 2077 W Cougar Place Property Details

citations.claim: Zane Ritenour is the owner and qualifying party for B-J Drilling Company, Inc.
citations.title: BJ Drilling Company Website

neighbors.verification_notes: Verified ownership via address match to PIN. Upgraded influence to Medium due to ownership of 'premier' local drilling company. Removed incorrect citation to coyotegulch.blog.

neighbors.name: Jason L. Shepherd & Meshell D. Shepherd
neighbors.claims: Meshell and Jason Shepherd are linked to property holdings in Arizona through investment records ([elementix.ai](https://elementix.ai/investors/az/meshell-shepherd)). While a Jason Shepherd is a prominent political figure in Georgia, no evidence links the Cochise County landowner to that public profile or any local development stance ([judiciary.house.gov](https://judiciary.house.gov/sites/evo-subsites/republicans-judiciary.house.gov/files/2025-11/FBI-HJC119-AF-000001-000198.pdf)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach with standard landowner outreach protocols, focusing on property value preservation and visual screening.

citations.claim: Meshell and Jason Shepherd are linked to property holdings in Arizona through investment records
citations.title: Meshell Shepherd Investor Profile

citations.claim: While a Jason Shepherd is a prominent political figure in Georgia, no evidence links the Cochise County landowner to that public profile
citations.title: FBI/House Judiciary Document mentioning Jason Shepherd (Georgia)

neighbors.verification_notes: Verified existence of Meshell/Jason Shepherd entity in AZ. Disambiguated from Georgia politician Jason Shepherd. Original citations removed as they did not support claims.

neighbors.name: Gale Nellans
neighbors.claims: No public records could be found to verify Gale Nellans as the current owner of parcel 106-15-013C or as a resident of Cochise County. Historical records indicate individuals with this name residing in Virginia and Indiana ([genealogy.fulco.lib.in.us](http://genealogy.fulco.lib.in.us/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/Obituaries_1989.pdf)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Verify ownership with county assessor before attempting contact.

citations.claim: Historical records indicate individuals with this name residing in Virginia and Indiana
citations.title: 1989 Obituaries mentioning Gale Nellans

neighbors.verification_notes: Could not verify existence of Gale Nellans in Cochise County. Original citations did not mention this individual.
